𝗠𝗢𝗗𝗟𝗬 | Generating 3D models from images using local AI processing.  🌟 Rising Fast!

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Generating 3D models from images using local AI processing.
📅 Created: Mar 2026 • Updated: May 2026

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ AI-powered image-to-3D mesh generation
✅ Runs entirely on local GPU
✅ Open-source desktop application
✅ Supports external AI model extensions
✅ Available for Windows and Linux


▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 3.8K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 401 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 15 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Modly is an open-source desktop application that leverages local AI models running on your GPU to generate 3D models from 2D images. It supports an extension system for integrating various AI models and is available for Windows and Linux, with macOS support planned.

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/lightningpixel/modly

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

𝗣𝗟𝗔𝗜𝗡-𝗔𝗣𝗣 | Securely managing and accessing an Android phone's data and features from a web browser on the same local network, without relying on cloud services.  🔥 Super Hot!

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🤖 Kotlin 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Securely managing and accessing an Android phone's data and features from a web browser on the same local network, without relying on cloud services.
📅 Created: Oct 2021 • Updated: May 2026

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Web-based phone management (no desktop app needed)
✅ 100% local and end-to-end encrypted communication
✅ File browsing, upload, download, rename, delete
✅ Media viewing, streaming, and management
✅ Contacts, SMS, and call log management
✅ Real-time notification mirroring
✅ Live screen mirroring with remote control
✅ Built-in tools: Markdown notes, RSS reader, media player, P2P chat, Pomodoro timer
✅ Free, ad-free, and fully open-source


┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 5K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 285 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 53 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

PlainApp is an open-source Android application that provides a secure, self-hosted web interface for managing your phone from any device on the same network. It offers a comprehensive suite of tools for file management, media browsing, communication, and even screen mirroring, all without relying on cloud services.

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/plainhub/plain-app

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

𝗨𝗡𝗜𝗙𝗜-𝗗𝗢𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗥 | To provide an easy-to-deploy and manage Unifi Network Controller instance using Docker, abstracting away underlying system dependencies and complexities.  📈 Growing!

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 Shell 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide an easy-to-deploy and manage Unifi Network Controller instance using Docker, abstracting away underlying system dependencies and complexities.
📅 Created: Feb 2015 • Updated: May 2026

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Dockerized Unifi Controller
✅ Simplified installation and upgrades
✅ Version and dependency management
✅ Cross-platform compatibility (Ubuntu, Debian, macOS, Windows, Raspberry Pi)
✅ Persistent data storage outside the container


▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 2.6K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 491 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 13 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

This repository provides a Dockerized version of Ubiquiti's Unifi Controller, simplifying installation, management, and upgrades. It bundles the controller, Java, and OS dependencies into a single container, ensuring a consistent environment across various operating systems and hardware.

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/jacobalberty/unifi-docker

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

𝗧𝗔𝗫𝗛𝗔𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗥 | Automating the extraction and organization of financial data from receipts and invoices using AI for accounting and tax purposes, with a focus on self-hosting and data privacy.  📈 Growing!

•••••••••••••••••••••••

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Automating the extraction and organization of financial data from receipts and invoices using AI for accounting and tax purposes, with a focus on self-hosting and data privacy.
📅 Created: Mar 2025 • Updated: May 2026

•••••••••••••••••••••••

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ AI-powered data extraction from receipts and invoices (OCR)
✅ Automatic categorization of transactions
✅ Multi-currency support with historical exchange rates (including crypto)
✅ Support for various LLMs including OpenAI, Gemini, Mistral, and local models via Ollama
✅ Item splitting from invoices
✅ Structured data storage with filtering and import/export
✅ Customizable data extraction with user-defined AI prompts
✅ Self-hosted deployment


•••••••••••••••••••••••

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 6K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 972 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 21 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

•••••••••••••••••••••••

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

TaxHacker is a self-hosted AI-powered accounting application designed to automate expense and income tracking for freelancers and small businesses. It leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) to extract data from receipts and invoices, supports multi-currency conversions, and allows for custom data extraction through user-defined prompts.

•••••••••••••••••••••••

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/vas3k/TaxHacker

𝗧𝗥𝗔𝗗𝗜𝗡𝗚𝗔𝗚𝗘𝗡𝗧𝗦 | To develop and deploy autonomous AI agents for automated financial trading and market analysis.  📈 Growing!

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To develop and deploy autonomous AI agents for automated financial trading and market analysis.
📅 Created: Dec 2024 • Updated: May 2026

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Multi-agent LLM financial trading framework
✅ Support for various LLM providers (OpenAI, Gemini, Claude, Grok, etc.)
✅ Structured output agents for research, trading, and portfolio management
✅ Backtesting capabilities with date fidelity
✅ Persistent decision logging and LangGraph checkpoint resume
✅ Docker support and cross-platform stability
✅ Configurability via environment variables and API-key auto-detection
✅ Remote Ollama support


⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 80.5K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 15.7K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 223 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

TradingAgents is a Python framework designed for multi-agent financial trading using Large Language Models (LLMs). It enables the creation of autonomous trading agents that can research markets, make trading decisions, and manage portfolios.

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
